title: schizoloma cuneatum
intro: Schizoloma cuneatum is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lindsaeaceae, commonly known as the cuneate shield fern. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schizoloma cuneatum include treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as being used as a treatment for wounds and ulcers. Herbal preparations of Schizoloma cuneatum include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the fronds in hot water or boiling them in a liquid.
